llmResponse.agenda_changes: Item 7.2 (Approval of Energy Services Agreement) was moved from Bond Program Action Items to a discussion item, to be placed after item 6.1 (Public Hearing). This was announced at the start of the meeting during Changes to the Agenda.
llmResponse.consent_vote_words: I'll move to approve the consent agenda. Second. All those in favor?
